# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive \
    LANG=C.UTF-8 \
    LC_ALL=C.UTF-8

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    nginx \
    postgresql \
    redis-server \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    python3-venv \
    supervisor \
    tini \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /app /var/log/supervisor /run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql/data /var/lib/redis \
 && chown -R postgres:postgres /run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql /var/lib/redis

RUN mkdir -p /var/www/html \
 && echo 'OK' > /var/www/html/index.html

RUN cat > /usr/local/bin/api-server <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, HTTPServer
class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def do_GET(self):
        body = b"API server is running\n"
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/plain")
        self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(body)))
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(body)
    def log_message(self, format, *args):
        pass
HTTPServer(("0.0.0.0", 8080), Handler).serve_forever()
EOF
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/api-server

RUN cat > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'
server {
    listen 80 default_server;
    listen [::]:80 default_server;
    root /var/www/html;
    index index.html;
    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
    }
}
EOF

RUN sed -i 's/^#\?listen_addresses = .*/listen_addresses = '\''*'\''/' /etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf || true \
 && printf "host all all 0.0.0.0/0 trust\nhost all all ::0/0 trust\n" >> /etc/postgresql/*/main/pg_hba.conf || true \
 && sed -i "s/^bind .*/bind 0.0.0.0 ::1/" /etc/redis/redis.conf || true \
 && sed -i "s/^supervised .*/supervised no/" /etc/redis/redis.conf || true

RUN cat > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/multi-service.conf <<'EOF'
[supervisord]
nodaemon=true

[program:nginx]
command=/usr/sbin/nginx -g 'daemon off;'
autorestart=true
priority=10

[program:api]
command=/usr/local/bin/api-server
autorestart=true
priority=20

[program:postgres]
user=postgres
command=/usr/lib/postgresql/*/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/data -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/*/main/postgresql.conf
autorestart=true
priority=30

[program:redis]
user=redis
command=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf
autorestart=true
priority=40
EOF

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/tini","--"]
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord","-c","/etc/supervisor/conf.d/multi-service.conf"]
